title: guzmania berteroniana
intro: Guzmania berteroniana, also known as the 'Berteron's Pineapple', is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This epiphytic plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Guzmania berteroniana include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Guzmania berteroniana include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
